title: Two pilots in two different flights reported the same UFO over Governador Valadares-MG [1979]
excerpt: November 29, 1979. Time: 11:20pm. Duration: 6 minutes. text_preview: November 29, 1979. Time: 11:20pm. Duration: 6 minutes. When maneuvering his aircraft over the region between the cities of Governador Valadares and Belorizonte, in the State of Minas Gerais, at about 31,000 ft of altitude, the QD 555 pilot spotted an unidentified flying object in its “1-hour” position . At the same time, the pilot of another aircraft, the VP 377 at about 50 NM from Piraí at 24,000 ft, confirms the information from the QD-555. According to the QD-555 pilot, the UFO changed color. From red, to orange, white, and it had already changed his altitude. When already 30 NM from Belo H
summary: On 29 Nov 1979 two commercial airline pilots (QD-555 and VP-377) independently corroborated a color-changing UFO performing acrobatic maneuvers at altitude near Governador Valadares, MG.
